description: Implement documentation quality metrics including README completeness analysis (sections present), JSDoc/TSDoc coverage ratio (documented vs total exports), CHANGELOG presence and recency tracking, API documentation completeness, and code comment density calculation. These metrics help prioritize documentation work alongside code improvements.
goal: Add comprehensive documentation quality analysis to measure coverage, completeness, and freshness of project documentation
requirements: Detect and parse README.md files with section completeness scoring
Calculate JSDoc/TSDoc coverage ratio (documented exports vs total exports)
Detect CHANGELOG presence and calculate recency (last update)
Calculate code comment density (lines of comments vs total lines)
Integrate into ContextGenerator with markdown output section

success_criteria.coverage: All major documentation types analyzed (README, JSDoc, CHANGELOG, comments)
success_criteria.integration: Results appear in context.json and context.md
